CustomField.description: This field displays the underlying rates and the related details as of the latest approved utilization. Automatically updated when the latest actual utilization is approved. Use this field for a quick reference to view rates without navigating to child records.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This field displays the underlying rates and the related details as of the latest approved utilization. Automatically updated when the latest actual utilization is approved. Use this field for a quick reference to view rates without navigating to child records.
CustomField.label: Current Rate Details Overview
